name: Visiting /messages redirects to /assistant?from=messages and shows a one-time toast
description: Old bookmarks / docs / emails linking to /messages should still work — the route 302s to /assistant. To avoid a silent redirect (audit P6.14), the assistant page mounts a tiny RedirectToast island when ?from=messages is present; it surfaces 'We've consolidated messaging into the assistant.' for ~6s and self-strips the query param so a refresh doesn't re-show it.

persona.name: Returning user
persona.role: Has /messages bookmarked from an earlier version
persona.context: Company has been around long enough for old links to exist.

steps.action: Navigates to /messages directly (typed URL or click bookmark)

steps.expect: RedirectToast island shows a small banner near the top: 'We've consolidated messaging into the assistant.' with optional close X
Toast self-dismisses with a fade; query param '?from=messages' is removed via history.replaceState so a refresh doesn't re-trigger
Toast does NOT reappear — URL is now clean /assistant

evaluationCriteria.check: Toast uses a non-intrusive banner color (teal/coffee), not red/error; positioned where it doesn't obscure the chat input or new-conversation hero
User understands what happened in one glance; the redirect is no longer silent
history.replaceState strips ONLY the from=messages param, preserves any other params; mount is conditional on the param existing
Toast has role=status with aria-live=polite; auto-dismiss timer respects prefers-reduced-motion (uses display:none vs animated fade if reduced)
